Article Title: 'Will make Tehri important place for water, adventure sports': CM Dhami attends Tehri Lake Festival
Article Text:
"We will continue our efforts to give more speed to the possibilities here and to give them wings. We have started this. We will work to move this forward", Dhami said.

TEHRI GARHWAL (UTTARAKHAND): Uttarakhand chief minister Pushkar Singh Dhami on Friday attended the Tehri Lake Festival Himalayan-O2 2026, highlighting the objective to make it a major hub for sports.Adressing the event, he said, "Our government's goal is to make Tehri an important place for water and adventure sports. A place where national and international athletes come for water sports and adventure sports," he said, adding that sports such as kayaking, canoeing, jet skiing, and scuba diving are being encouraged."We will continue our efforts to give more speed to the possibilities here and to give them wings.We have started this. We will work to move this forward", he added.Highlighting that the development of the Tehri Lake is being carried out as part of the Pratam Gram of Timan village, he said, "Rs 1.3 billion has been invested in the development of the Tehri Lake and the construction of the Ring Road."Encouraging the players to pursue their sports, he assured them of support from the government."I would like to tell all our players that they should dedicate themselves to the sport, and they should carry this feeling with them in their lives.I would like to tell all the young players that they should move forward with full dedication, enthusiasm and self-confidence to realize their dreams," said Dhami."I am sure that in the future, you will definitely make India and our state proud on national and international stages," he added.Tehri Lake is steadily emerging as a major attraction for tourists from across India and abroad. Under the leadership of chief minister Dhami, tourism in Uttarakhand is gaining a new identity.The CM also emphasized that through tourism, new employment opportunities are being created for local youth.
Article Summary: "we will continue our efforts to give more speed to the possibilities here and to give them wings. We have started this. We will work to move this forward", dhami said. Tehri lake is steadily emerging as a major attraction for tourists.

Article Title: Connor Hellebuyck leads Winnipeg Jets past Andrei Vasilevskiy as NHL games deliver major results
Article Text:
Connor Hellebuyck delivered a standout performance with 41 outstanding saves as the United States edged Canada 2-1 in a dramatic overtime win in the gold-medal game. (Credit: Getty Images)

Connor Hellebuyck’s Most Ridiculous Saves

Connor Hellebuyck of Winnipeg Jets defeat Andrei Vasilevskiy's Tampa Bay Lightning NHL game



The recent NHL activity presented a number of significant outcomes, with teams still fighting momentum in the regular season. The game that was expected the most was a duel of the best goaltenders, Connor Hellebuyck of the Winnipeg Jets and Andrei Vasilevskiy of the Tampa Bay Lightning.Even though Winnipeg gained a comfortable victory thanks to the performance of Hellebuyck, other teams achieved significant victories as well. The New York Rangers left an overwhelming experience against the Toronto Maple Leafs, and the Columbus Blue Jackets sustained their good streak by gaining another key victory over the Florida Panthers.The Winnipeg Jets won the much-hyped goaltending duel with Andrei Vasilevskiy after Connor Hellebuyck made 41 saves in leading the team to a 4-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Lightning.Hellebuyck recorded 26 saves on the field, which gave Winnipeg an advantage in the defense, and it was not allowing Tampa Bay room to score.During the second period Jets established a gap after Morgan Barron and Mark Scheifele scored goal after goal to provide the home team with an advantage. Winnipeg later scored another goal by Gustav Nyquist, who had scored his first goal with the team. Kyle Connor went ahead to complete the win with an empty net late in the third period.Tampa Bay scored just one goal, which was made by Brayden Point, yet the Lightning failed to create any offensive momentum against the defensive setup of Winnipeg. The defeat marked a bad streak for Tampa Bay after a good performance earlier in the season.In other parts of the NHL, the Toronto Maple Leafs lost to the New York Rangers 6-2. Alexis Lafreniere hit a crucial goal in the third period; Mika Zibanejad and Vladislav Gavrikov also assisted the Rangers in closing the gap after the match opened with a competitive situation.Another significant victory of the Columbus Blue Jackets was a 4-2 win over the Florida Panthers. Ivan Provorov contributed significantly, scoring a goal and two assists, and Mathieu Olivier was a goal scorer and assisted in winning it. The outcome was a continuation of the good performance of Columbus as the team struggles to stay in the playoff game.
Article Summary: The united states edged canada 2-1 in a dramatic overtime win in the gold-medal game. Connor hellebuyck made 41 saves in leading the winnipeg jets to a 4-1 victory over the tampa bay lightning. The new york rangers left an overwhelming experience against the toronto maple leafs, and the columbus blue jackets sustained their good streak by gaining another key victory.

Article Title: Curtis Douglas: Tampa Bay Lightning Place Forward Curtis Douglas on Waivers Ahead of Deadline
Article Text:
Curtis Douglas with the Lightning (Via Getty Images)

Curtis Douglas Brings His Physical Presence in Limited Role



The Tampa Bay Lightning placed forward Curtis Douglas on waivers Thursday ahead of Friday's 3 p.m. NHL Trade Deadline. The move creates additional roster flexibility as the Atlantic Division leaders position themselves to add depth for a playoff run.If Douglas clears waivers, he is expected to be assigned to AHL Syracuse. That gives the Lightning an open spot on their powerhouse roster that head coach Jon Cooper could use to bring in some fresh names and push for the playoffs while adding to their blue line.Despite his size, Douglas has been mostly used as an enforcer so far by the Lightning. With 92 penalty minutes across 29 games, the 25-year-old leads the franchise in PIMs.Cooper has gone with a top-heavy approach so far this season and the forward hasn’t seen much use beyond that.Despite this, his 6’9”, 242-pound frame makes him one of the best choices for teams looking to add some grit to their front line. Tampa Bay themselves would like to add someone with more playoff experience to their forward corps but Douglas can play the enforcer role for teams going for a more offensive approach.Douglas recorded two assists, 17 shots on goal and 32 hits in his 29 games this season. While he has shown flashes of offensive upside during AHL stints, that production has not carried over to the NHL level.Tampa Bay assigned Douglas to Syracuse on a conditioning stint in January before recalling him to the NHL roster. The move allowed him to maintain game fitness and work on his offensive game in the minors.His return to the Lightning lineup proved temporary as the organization now looks to create space for more pressing roster needs. Douglas will head back to Syracuse if he passes through waivers unclaimed by another organization.The young center has demonstrated offensive potential in the AHL throughout his development but has struggled to translate that success to the NHL. His primary value at the top level has centered on physical play and enforcing rather than skill-based contributions.As for the Lightning, the team has been going through a sudden slump since the season resumed from the Olympic Break. In their last five games, the franchise has lost their last four and their defensive struggles have been exposed against the likes of Minnesota and Buffalo.While they still hold the number one spot in the Atlantic Division, the Sabres have already tied them in points. Cooper understands that despite Lightning having two games in hand, things can take a wrong turn if its defensive struggles continue.With the deadline approaching, the organization appears focused on adding pieces that can contribute during a deep postseason run. Clearing Douglas from the roster provides both cap flexibility and an open spot for potential incoming talent through trade.The franchise has failed to regain the same dominance since its Stanley Cup Finals loss to the Colorado Avalanche in 2022. This season, they look re-energized and have the chance to make another deep playoff run. And offloading some names is essential for that.
Article Summary: The tampa bay lightning placed forward curtis douglas on waivers thursday ahead of friday's 3 p.m. nhl trade deadline. The move creates additional roster flexibility as the atlantic division leaders position themselves to add depth for a playoff run. Douglas will head back to syracuse if he passes through waivers unclaimed by another organization.

Article Title: Nfl Trade News 2026: NFL Trade News: Chicago Bears solve $42M O-Line problem with Garrett Bradbury trade from New England Patriots
Article Text:
NFL Trade News: Chicago Bears solve $42M O-Line problem with Garrett Bradbury trade from New England Patriots (Image via Imagn)

Chicago Bears plug the center gap with veteran Garett Bradbury after Drew Dalman's retirement shock

The Chicago Bears moved fast after a sudden hole opened at the center position. The team landed Garrett Bradbury in a trade with the New England Patriots, according to reports on March 6. The move arrives just days after Pro Bowl center Drew Dalman stunned the league with his retirement.The Bears had invested $42 million in Dalman last offseason. His decision left the team with a costly problem in the middle of the offensive line. The trade for Garrett Bradbury now gives the team an experienced starter as they reshape the unit ahead of the 2026 NFL season.The Bears did not wait long to address the problem. According to Ian Rapoport of NFL Network, Bradbury's trade news will become official when the new league year opens on March 11.Chicago will send a 2027 fifth-round pick to the New England Patriots.The post reads, “Sources: The #Patriots are trading center Garrett Bradbury to the #Bears, giving them a new center. The deal can't officially be processed until the league year begins.”Bradbury brings stability to a position that suddenly lacked depth. The 30-year-old started all 17 games for the Patriots in the 2025 season. His durability became a key factor in Chicago’s decision.The veteran center entered the league as the No. 18 overall pick in the 2019 NFL Draft with the Minnesota Vikings. He spent six seasons in Minnesota before joining New England last year. Across seven NFL seasons, Garrett Bradbury has more than 100 regular-season starts.Per Garrett Bradbury's PFF rating, he started 21 games and played 1,334 snaps in his lone season with the Patriots, showing his durability and importance on the offensive line. He allowed only 2 sacks and 4 QB hits, while posting a 98.0 pass block efficiency, indicating solid protection in passing situations.However, he still gave up 29 pressures and 23 hurries, and his 64.1 pass block grade and 55.9 run block grade suggest he performed better in pass protection than in the run game overall.Chicago’s urgency links directly to Dalman’s retirement. The Pro Bowler played every offensive snap in 2025 and showed no major injury concerns. Yet he chose to walk away at just 27. Courtney Cronin discussed the situation on ESPN’s NFL Live on March 5 during coverage from the NFL Combine. She explained that Dalman had seen the long-term effects of football on former players. “He played every single snap last year, and there were no health issues,” Cronin said on the show. “But Drew has seen the effects that an NFL career can have on someone.”That decision forced Chicago to act quickly. The front office wanted a proven centre that could step in from Day 1. Bradbury fits that profile.This trade move also forms part of a busy week for the Bears. The team added wide receiver DJ Moore through another deal and released linebacker Tremaine Edmunds to clear cap space. Now the focus shifts to the offensive line. With Bradbury in the middle, Chicago hopes the unit regains balance after Dalman’s sudden exit.
Article Summary: Garett bradbury was traded from the new england patriots to the chicago bears. The move comes just days after drew dalman stunned the league with his retirement. The bears had invested $42 million in dalman last offseason. His decision left the team with a costly problem in the middle of the offensive line.

Article Title: “Disgusting”: Fans erupt online after 17-year-old Joseph Contreras’ stunning moment against Aaron Judge in WBC opener
Article Text:
Aaron Judge and Joseph Contreras (Image via: IG/X)

Fans react after 17-year-old Joseph Contreras stops Aaron Judge with bases loaded during World Baseball Classic opener

The World Baseball Classic opener delivered a moment few fans expected. Brazil’s 17-year-old Joseph Contreras faced Team USA captain Aaron Judge with the bases loaded in the second inning. What followed quickly became one of the most talked about moments of the night.Judge had already made his impact earlier in the game. The three-time American League MVP launched a home run in the first inning and looked comfortable at the plate. When he stepped up again with runners everywhere, fans expected another big hit.Instead, the teenage pitcher from Brazil stayed calm under pressure. Contreras threw a pitch that forced Judge into a ground ball that quickly turned into a double play. The inning ended suddenly, stopping a dangerous scoring chance for Team USA.Within minutes the play started spreading across social media platforms. Fans watching the World Baseball Classic quickly shared clips and reactions online.A high school senior challenging one of baseball’s biggest stars instantly caught attention.Contreras already carries a familiar baseball name. He is the son of former MLB pitcher Jose Contreras, who played 11 seasons in the league. The young pitcher is also ranked by MLB.com as the No.47 draft prospect this year.Still, what truly fueled the conversation online was the reaction from fans. Viewers were stunned that a 17-year-old escaped such a tough situation. Facing Aaron Judge with the bases loaded rarely ends well for pitchers.Some fans reacted with humor about the generational matchup. One fan summed it up in a short message online. “High School beats Old school.”Others focused on the teenager’s pitching ability and confidence. One viewer pointed out the speed and movement on his pitches. “Throwing 97 with that Vulcan Change at 17 is disgusting.”A few fans also joked about Judge’s struggles in pressure moments. One comment compared the two innings of the game in a sarcastic way. “in the first inning Judge of the regular season second inning Judge of the postseason.”Some reactions turned their attention to Judge’s leadership role. The Yankees superstar is serving as Team USA’s captain in this tournament. That detail made the moment even more surprising for some viewers.One fan questioned the situation directly after the play. “and this is our captain?!?!?!” the user wrote on social media. The comment quickly drew responses from other fans.Another viewer reacted with frustration about the missed opportunity. “We need a new captain,” the fan posted during the discussion. The reaction showed how intense expectations are for Team USA.Other fans leaned into humor while discussing the moment. Some joked about Judge missing a big opportunity against a teenager. “He can’t buy a clutch hit even against a high school kid,” another fan wrote. Despite the jokes and criticism, many fans praised Contreras.Handling that level of pressure at just 17 impressed viewers around the baseball world. Moments like this remind fans why the World Baseball Classic is so unpredictable. For Joseph Contreras, the play instantly became a career highlight. Facing one of baseball’s most feared hitters and escaping the inning is rare. But on this stage, the teenage pitcher delivered a moment fans will remember.
Article Summary: Brazil’s 17-year-old joseph contreras faced team usa captain aaron judge with the bases loaded in the second inning of the world baseball classic opener. The teenage pitcher threw a pitch that forced judge into a ground ball that quickly turned into a double play. Within minutes the play started spreading across social media platforms.

Article Title: 'Lost to Australia in 2023': Shoaib Akhtar says Ahmedabad pressure will haunt India in T20 World Cup final vs New Zealand
Article Text:
File photo/Agencies

All eyes on how India handle pressure and pitch vs West Indies | T20 World Cup 2026

Akhtar, Gul speak about pressure on India



Former Pakistan cricketers Shoaib Akhtar and Umar Gul have spoken about the pressure on India ahead of the T20 World Cup 2026 final against New Zealand, pointing to the expectations of a large fan base and India’s recent results at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad. India will face New Zealand in the final on Sunday (March 8) at the venue.India had suffered a 76-run defeat to South Africa during the Super 8 stage of the tournament at the same ground, a result that pushed them close to elimination before they recorded wins against Zimbabwe and the West Indies. India had also lost the 2023 ODI World Cup final to Australia at the Narendra Modi Stadium.The venue, which can accommodate 132,000 spectators, has also drawn attention due to the atmosphere during major matches and India’s results there in recent tournaments.This has led to talk among some observers that Ahmedabad has not been favourable for India in big games.Referring to these factors, former Pakistan fast bowler Shoaib Akhtar said India’s record at the Narendra Modi Stadium and the expectations of fans could create pressure during the final."If the wicket at Ahmedabad grips and if it’s favourable for spinners, the par score will be around 200 or 175. Safe score would be 200 plus only.Now, will New Zealand be able to score 250 or 225 against India? If they do, India will be under a lot of pressure," Shoaib Akhtar said on Game on Hai show."It’s also clear as daylight that India will also come full prepared. I feel New Zealand may get bogged down in front of India, but India also have pressure of 1.5 billion people. They have already lost a match at Ahmedabad to Australia in the World Cup final."Akhtar, however, said India remain the favourites for the title but added that New Zealand winning the tournament would also be good for the sport."I see India as the winner out of all this, but for cricket’s sake, it’s high time New Zealand should win this World Cup."Former Pakistan pacer Umar Gul, who was part of the same discussion, said the expectations around the home side could add to the pressure during the final."New Zealand bowling attack appears stronger. India can be under pressure due to the home team’s big population," Gul said. "New Zealand recently won a series in India (Test series). They have experience with spin track, and India may also think that these guys played well against us and defeated us. New Zealand will have confidence. It will be a good final."India reached the final after defeating England in the semi-final at the Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai on Thursday.
Article Summary: Former pakistan cricketers shoaib akhtar and umar gul have spoken about the pressure on india ahead of the t20 world cup 2026 final against new zealand. They pointed to the expectations of a large fan base and india’s recent results at the narendra modi stadium in ahmedabad.

Article Title: Shane Bieber’s wife Kara’s playful comment on Alex Bregman’s wife Reagan’s Houston photos sparks buzz
Article Text:
Alex Bregman with his family (Image via: IG/X)

Shane Bieber’s wife Kara Bieber reacts with a playful comment after Reagan Elizabeth shares Houston photos celebrating Team USA’s arrival



Alex Bregman reflects on returning to Houston while representing Team USA in the World Baseball Classic

The World Baseball Classic has brought fresh excitement to Houston as Team USA prepares to begin its pool play games in the city. Among the players returning to a familiar place is Alex Bregman, who spent the first part of his Major League Baseball career with the Houston Astros before moving on to the next chapter of his journey. While fans are focused on the star filled roster competing in the international tournament, a social media post from Bregman’s wife Reagan Elizabeth has also caught attention online.Reagan recently shared a set of photos on Instagram while visiting Houston. The pictures showed her posing against the city skyline while wearing a patriotic American flag themed jacket. Along with the photos, she wrote, “Back in Houston for Team USA.”The post quickly drew reactions from followers and other baseball families including Shane Bieber's wife Kara, who later left a playful comment.The moment soon turned into a friendly exchange in the comments section. Shane Bieber’s wife Kara Bieber reacted to the post with an enthusiastic message, writing, “OK!!!! she's representing 👏.” Reagan replied with heart emojis, keeping the interaction light and cheerful as fans joined in celebrating the Team USA moment.Reagan Elizabeth’s Instagram post quickly gained attention among fans following updates around the World Baseball Classic.Many followers praised the patriotic jacket and the excitement of being in Houston as Team USA begins its tournament run. Some fans pointed out that Houston remains closely connected to Alex Bregman’s baseball story.While Reagan’s post created buzz on social media, Alex Bregman himself spoke about how meaningful it feels to return to Houston. The third baseman spent the first nine seasons of his MLB career with the Astros and helped the team win two World Series titles during that time. Now back in Houston as a member of Team USA, Bregman said the experience brings back many memories.“It feels great to be back here,” said Bregman, who left as a free agent for Boston two years ago and now plays for the Cubs. “Obviously a lot of great memories here. I look forward to doing so with the Stars and Stripes on my chest.”Bregman is appearing in his second World Baseball Classic after previously playing in the 2017 tournament. He missed the 2023 edition while recovering from a finger injury. “It’s exciting to be in the WBC,” Bregman said. “It’s an honor to represent our country. We’re all extremely proud to be a a part of this team.” As Team USA begins its games in Houston, the city once again becomes part of Bregman’s baseball journey while he looks to create new memories wearing the Stars and Stripes.
Article Summary: Alex bregman's wife reagan elizabeth shared photos on instagram celebrating team usa's arrival in houston for the world baseball classic. Shane bieber’s wife kara bieber reacted to the post with an enthusiastic message, writing, “ok!!!! She's representing 👏”

Article Title: Tom Brady Logan Paul: “Don’t want any smoke with the NFL”: Logan Paul’s $1M challenge to Tom Brady sparks unexpected reaction from his own podcast partner
Article Text:
Logan Paul’s $1M challenge to Tom Brady sparks unexpected reaction from his own podcast partner (Getty)

Mike Majlak publicly distances himself from Logan Paul’s Tom Brady challenge



Logan Paul sparked fresh sports drama this week after issuing a $1 million boxing challenge to several NFL players, including seven-time Super Bowl champion Tom Brady. The social media star-turned-WWE performer claimed that no football player could defeat him in a boxing ring.The challenge quickly spread across sports media and social platforms. However, the most surprising reaction came from inside Paul’s own circle. His Impaulsive podcast co-host, Mike Majlak, publicly distanced himself from the situation and made it clear that he does not want to get involved in a fight with NFL players.Mike Majlak addressed the situation on March 6, 2026, in a post on X. While fans treated the feud as entertainment, Majlak took a different tone, joking that he had no interest in picking a fight with NFL stars.“Just to be clear, the views expressed by my podcast co-host are his views and his views alone,” Majlak wrote on X on March 6, 2026. “I personally don’t want any smoke with the NFL or its affiliates, including but not limited to Tom Brady or Puka Nacua. Logan will be hearing from my lawyers.”He followed the statement with another line that showed the post was laced with sarcasm. “I have just been told that we actually have the same lawyers, so they will be hearing from themselves,” Majlak added in the same post on X.The exchange arrived after Logan Paul made his bold claims during a recent episode of his Impaulsive podcast. Speaking during the show, Paul argued that professional football players rely on athleticism rather than fighting skill, which, in his view, would give him the advantage inside a boxing ring.“Not a single football player could beat me in a boxing match, that is on God,” Paul said on the Impaulsive podcast earlier this week. “I would throttle Myles Garrett, Puka Nacua, Tom Brady, Sam Darnold, doesn’t matter.”Paul then raised the stakes with a financial challenge. “A million dollars, you come to the gym, you put up boxing gloves, we see how it goes. There are levels to this,” he said during the same podcast conversation.Soon after the episode circulated online, several NFL players reacted publicly. Buffalo Bills OL Dion Dawkins, LB Tae Crowder, guard Brock Hoffman, and Chiefs tackle Kingsley Suamataia all showed interest in the challenge on social media. However, Paul later responded on X and claimed none of the players accepted his exact terms. He said the offer required a $1 million escrow from both sides and a private fight at his gym in Puerto Rico with official referees and judges.As of now, the situation remains a war of words rather than a real fight. Still, Majlak’s reaction added an unexpected twist. While Logan Paul appears eager to test himself against NFL athletes such as Tom Brady, his own podcast partner has already made one thing clear. He wants no part of the smoke.
Article Summary: Mike majlak publicly distances himself from logan paul’s tom brady challenge. Paul issued a $1 million boxing challenge to several nfl players, including seven-time super bowl champion tom brady. The social media star-turned-wwe performer claimed no football player could defeat him in a boxing ring.

Article Title: NFL free agency tracker: Biggest signings and moves across the league
Article Text:
Image via IMAGN

Texans extend Danielle Hunter

Rams stay aggressive with key moves

Bills land star receiver D.J. Moore

Other notable moves around the league

The offseason for the 2026 season is already heating up as NFL teams start to change their rosters in preparation for the new league year. The official free agency period doesn't start until March 11, but a number of important signings, trades, and contract extensions have already happened.Before players officially become free agents, teams are rushing quickly to get the best players. The offseason has already made big news across the league, from contract extensions for elite defenders to big transactions involving Pro Bowl players.Key trades that have happened so far in the 2026 NFL free agency period.One of the most important deals of the early offseason involves edge rusher Danielle Hunter and the Houston Texans.The Texans agreed to a one-year extension worth $40.1 million with the All-Pro defender.Hunter is one of the best pass rushers in the game and an important part of Houston's defense. By securing his future before free agency begins, the team has ensured that one of their top defensive stars would remain in place as they look to build.The Los Angeles Rams have also been active early in the offseason. The franchise re-signed veteran tight end Tyler Higbee to a two-year deal worth $8 million.Higbee has been a crucial part of the Rams' offense for a few seasons now, and he and quarterback Matthew Stafford have worked together to make the passing game work. Keeping the veteran tight end will help the offense stay the same as they enter into the 2026 season.The Rams also made a major defensive move by acquiring All-Pro cornerback Trent McDuffie in a trade with the Kansas City Chiefs. Los Angeles sent the No. 29 pick in the 2026 NFL Draft along with additional selections to complete the deal.The trade signals the Rams’ intent to strengthen their secondary as they continue to push for another deep playoff run.The Buffalo Bills made a big move by getting wide receiver D.J. Moore from the Chicago Bears.Buffalo sent a second-round pick in the 2026 draft to Chicago as part of the deal, while also receiving a fifth-round pick in return. Moore instantly adds another dangerous weapon to the Bills’ offense and could play a major role alongside quarterback Josh Allen.With the Bills continuing to chase a Super Bowl title, adding a proven wide receiver strengthens their passing attack heading into the new season.Several other transactions have also taken place across the league. The Houston Texans acquired running back David Montgomery in a trade with the Detroit Lions, adding another weapon to their offense.The New York Jets and Tennessee Titans, on the other hand, traded tackle T'Vondre Sweat and edge rusher Jermaine Johnson to the other team.These things could be just the beginning, since the legal tampering window is coming up and many of the best players are getting ready to see what the market has to offer. There will be a lot of huge trades and signings in the next few days as NFL teams continue their plans for the 2026 season.
Article Summary: The official free agency period for the 2026 nfl season doesn't start until march 11. The offseason has already made big news across the league, from contract extensions for elite defenders to big transactions involving pro bowl players. One of the most important deals of the early offseason involves edge rusher danielle hunter and the houston texans.

Article Title: NFL Free Agency 2026: Tampa Bay Buccaneers look for long term successor to $7M veteran linebacker
Article Text:
NFL Free Agency 2026: Tampa Bay Buccaneers look for long term successor to $7M veteran linebacker (Image via Getty: Tampa Bay Buccaneers logo)

Tampa Bay Buccaneers linebacker Lavonte David still has a lot of football left in him

Lavonte David has six contracts worth $100M with Tampa Bay Buccaneers

Buccaneers LB Lavonte David’s replacement could be Detroit Lions ’ Alex Anzalone

Just like 36-year-old Kansas City Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce , Tampa Bay Buccaneers’ linebacker Lavonte David has not decided on his retirement or return. 2026 would be Kelce’s 14th season and David’s 15th season.As per Chiefs Insider, Kelce is reportedly preparing for a return. But the longtime linebacker has not yet decided whether to retire or return, leaving very little time for the franchise to look for a long-term successor to his long-held throne.ESPN’s source said that Tampa Bay wants him back but has left the ball in the veteran’s court. JoeBucsFan reports that general manager Jason Licht and head coach Todd Bowles need to attack NFL free agency 2026 by next week if David plans to retire.But first, we saw an inkling of the linebacker’s return during his February appearance on the “Caps Off” podcast.“I feel good,” David said. “You know, I’m healthy. I’m happy. I’m undecided [on retiring]. I’m genuinely undecided. Like, I don’t know. I still got a lot of football left in me. I know that for sure.I still love the game. I know that for sure. The other side is that I want to spend more time with my daughter. She’s in school, so [I’ve been] taking her to school, and it’s a good feeling.”NBC Sports’ Mike Florio reports that David is at a crossroads. Even though he’s confident he can physically do it, life changes for a guy in his late 30s. Priorities change [daughter]. And football demands commitment of time, focus, and effort [something his podcast declaration also conveyed. He “wants” to spend more time with his daughter].Florio adds that at some point, the cost of continuing could outweigh the benefit. In particular, for a guy who has made $100.5 million under six different contracts with the same franchise.According to Spotrac, David signed a 4-year rookie contract worth $3.5M in 2012, a 5-year extension worth $50M in 2015, a 2-year extension worth $25M in 2021, a 1-year extension worth $4.5M in 2023, a 1-year extension worth $8.5M in 2024, and a 1-year extension worth $9M in 2025. His career earnings are $103M.If he returns, his calculated market value is a 1-year contract worth $7.4M, with an average annual salary of $7.4M. However, as of now, he is an unrestricted free agent and recently underwent knee surgery following the 2025 season.According to Joe Bucs Fan, he may continue rehabbing in case he decides to come back. Meanwhile, the question remains: who could fill his long-worn shoes if he doesn’t return? Let’s check.ESPN’s Matt Bowen suggests David’s perfect replacement could come in the form of an underrated Detroit Lions player, Alex Anzalone.The 31-year-old linebacker is quick to key the run, and Tampa Bay coach Todd Bowles is best at scheming his LBs on pressure stunts. The Buccaneers could add another productive veteran on defense in his form. He recorded 2.5 sacks and eight pass breakups in the 2025 season.Heavy Sports’ Christopher Sheppard reports that signing Anzalone as David’s successor could be a high-risk, high-reward move for the Buccaneers. He is only five years younger than Tampa Bay’s linebacker, but he has shone wherever he’s played, be it the Lions or the New Orleans Saints.As of early March 2026, he is an unrestricted free agent. This follows the closure of a 3-year, $18.75M contract with Detroit. According to Spotrac’s calculated market value, Anzalone is projected to sign a 2-year contract worth $14M, with an average annual salary of $7.3M.
Article Summary: Tampa bay buccaneers’ linebacker lavonte david has not decided on his retirement or return. David has made $100.5 million under six different contracts with the same franchise. If he returns, his calculated market value is a 1-year contract worth $7.4m. As of early march 2026, anzalone is an unrestricted free agent.

Article Title: Cristiano Ronaldo Injury Update: Cristiano Ronaldo fitness concern deepens as Al-Nassr coach issues latest injury update
Article Text:
Cristiano Ronaldo (Image credits: Getty Images)

Al-Nassr coach reveals concerning news on Ronaldo's hamstring injury

Title race pressure mounts ahead of Ronaldo targets before Portugal duty

Cristiano Ronaldo is facing an unexpected setback after Al-Nassr confirmed the Portuguese star has left Saudi Arabia to undergo treatment for a hamstring injury. The veteran forward limped off in Al-Nassr's 3-1 league win over Al-Fayha last weekend, and his future availability was immediately in question for the games to come. Later, head coach Jorge Jesus revealed that the injury is worse than they had expected. Ronaldo, who is still one of the most influential players in the Saudi Pro League at the age of 41, will now head over to Madrid to rework with his personal physiotherapist as Al-Nassr hopes their talisman returns before a crucial stretch of domestic and international games.Speaking ahead of Al-Nassr's upcoming clash with Neom Sports Club in the league, Jorge Jesus confirmed that medical examinations had indicated that spritz Jorge Jesus had a more complicated problem with his muscle than initially thought by the team."In the last game, Cristiano went away with a muscle injury," Jesus said. "After the tests he underwent, it was clear that it was a more serious injury than we were expecting. " The coach of Al-Nassr added that now, Ronaldo will travel to Madrid to start specialized recovery treatment.Ahead of Saturday's home league game against Neom Sports Club, Jorge Jesus said, "In the last game, Cristiano left with a muscle injury.”He added, “After the tests he underwent, it became clear that it is a more serious injury than we were expecting. He will need rest and recovery. Cristiano will travel to Spain for treatment, as will other players who were injured. He will need treatment from his personal physiotherapist. We hope he will return soon to help the team."The decision to undergo treatment in Spain is a long-standing preference of Ronaldo to work with trusted rehabilitation experts outside the club set up when dealing with muscle injuries. However, Al-Nassr hasn't given a specific timeline for his return, leaving uncertainty over how many games he could miss.Ronaldo has been one of the most influential players for Al-Nassr this season despite being in the later stages of his career. The current third-highest goal-scoring Portuguese captain in the Saudi Pro League, with 21 goals. Only Ivan Toney, who has scored 23 goals for Al-Ahli, is ahead of him. Al-Nassr are two points clear at the top of the standings, meaning the absence of a key player such as Ronaldo could have an impact on the club's momentum in the title race if the length of the recovery period is prolonged.There is also growing attention around the availability of Ronaldo for the international friendlies that will be played for Portugal. The Portugal national football team will play the Mexico national football team on March 28 at the renovated Estadio Azteca prior to facing the United States men's national soccer team on March 31 in Atlanta in their World Cup preparations. However, the immediate focus for Ronaldo will be recovery. The veteran forward remains desperate to press on with Al-Nassr's title bid as well as move closer to the historic goal of scoring 1,000 times in his career: a goal that keeps the football world watching his every step, even when he is injured and risks slowing down.
Article Summary: Cristiano ronaldo left al-nassr's 3-1 league win over al-fayha last weekend. Head coach jorge jesus revealed that the injury is worse than they had expected. Ronaldo will now head over to madrid to rework with his personal physiotherapist.

Article Title: New Bosses Introduced in the Where Winds Meet 1.4 Update
Article Text:
Image via Everstone Studio

New Bosses in Where Winds Meet 1.4 update

All Hexi Boss Fights Where Winds Meet

Wandering Ark:

Guo Xin:

The developers of Where Winds Meet have introduced some new bosses with the latest 1.4 update, Home Afar , which got a global release on March 6, 2026. Players will have access to new weapons like Everspring Umbrella and Hexi Blade that will help them sustain in the battle that awaits their adventure. In this article, we will have a brief discussion about the new bosses available in the 1.4 update of Where Winds Meet.In the latest Hexi expansion, the developers have introduced two new bosses, namely Wandering Ark and Guo Xin while they make progress in the story. Their features and attributes have been explained below:Players will encounter the Wandering Ark at Jade Gate Pass region.The entity is located at shifting sands and players can spot this boss once they teleport to the boundary stone located northeast of the Jade Gate pass map and get past the sandstorm.In the game, the Wandering Ark makes an appearance as a giant ship like creature, and it starts shooting multiple arrows, once players make an attempt to get close to it. The encounter becomes difficult for the players owing to the huge size of this entity.While facing the boss in the game, players have to make sure of two things. First of all, in phase 1, they need to target its leg support and take them down one by one, and they also have to be careful as the giant will charge straight at them. In phase 2, the boss gathers moonlight and unleashes a barrage of attacks and to avoid such attacks, gamers have to be skilled at footwork and use their Mythic Skill, cosmic reversal to turn that Moonlight against the Wandering Ark.Guo Xin is the last grand protector of Anxi, and he wields a massive spear with tremendous physical strength. He will also summon archers that will simultaneously attack with arrows. Players also have to keep an eye on for mo blade soldiers jumping in close combat.In this phase, players are not just fighting a general, but they are facing an entire army that will protect the Jade Gate pass. So, it is advisable for players to stay calm, utilise their deflects, dodges and find their opening into the storm.Therefore, the aforementioned details are the features and attributes about the new bosses introduced in Where Winds Meet 1.4 update.
Article Summary: The developers of where winds meet have introduced some new bosses with the latest 1.4 update, home afar. The latest update also goes by the name of hexi expansion, and this patch features new maps, quest lines and open world mechanics. While exploring the latest update in the game, players will also encounter powerful foes like wandering ark and guo xin.

Article Title: St. Louis Blues: St. Louis Blues Trade Captain Brayden Schenn to New York Islanders for First-Round Pick and Prospect
Article Text:
Brayden Schenn with the St. Louis Blues (Via Getty Images)

End of an Era in St. Louis With This Trade as Playoff Hopes End



Brayden Schenn's nine-year run in St. Louis is over. The Blues traded their captain to the New York Islanders on Friday for a first-round pick, a third-round pick, and a prospect, per TSN's Darren Dreger. Schenn had to waive his modified no-trade clause to make it happen.The Islanders weren't on his 15-team approved list, but the veteran chose to go anyway. He didn't want to leave last season. Schenn held a full no-trade clause in 2025 and chose to stay when the Blues explored moving him. But the landscape shifted this year with St. Louis near the bottom of the standings.The Blues have signaled their intention to tear things down.They've been shopping for Robert Thomas and Colton Parayko alongside Schenn. The writing was on the wall. Schenn was a central figure in the franchise's greatest moment.He played a top-line role on the 2019 Stanley Cup championship team and became the club's captain in 2023 after Ryan O'Reilly was dealt to Toronto. But so far this season, he has struggled to replicate that form with just 12 goals and 16 assists across 61 games.Additionally, his $6.5 million cap hit runs through 2028, giving the Islanders a term rather than a rental. Career totals of 290 goals and 713 points across 1,083 games speak to his consistency. Nine of his 17 NHL seasons were spent wearing the Blue Note.New York gets a physical, playoff-tested forward who can play center or either wing. His numbers have dipped this year, but he posted 50 points last season and has been a reliable top-six producer throughout his career.The Islanders project Schenn as their second-line center behind Bo Horvat. That keeps Mathew Barzal on the wing, where he has thrived. Jean-Gabriel Pageau and Casey Cizikas round out the bottom six. Schenn also provides insurance if Pageau, a pending unrestricted free agent, doesn't re-sign this summer.The risk is real. Schenn turns 35 in August and carries a significant cap hit for two more years. But a change of scenery and meaningful games could spark a veteran who spent the last three years captaining a rebuilding club.The Islanders sit third in the Metropolitan Division. They're betting Schenn's game ticks up now that he's playing for something.
Article Summary: Brayden schenn's nine-year run in st. louis is over. The blues traded their captain to the new york islanders on friday for a first-round pick, a third- round pick, and a prospect. Schenn had to waive his modified no-trade clause to make it happen.

Article Title: Florida Panthers: Seattle Kraken Interested in Florida Panthers' Mackie Samoskevich Ahead of Trade Deadline
Article Text:
Despite a struggling season, the Panthers are reportedly fielding trade interest for young forward Mackie Samoskevich from the Seattle Kraken. While Samoskevich's scoring has dipped, Florida values his potential and defensive growth, demanding a significant return. Seattle, with ample draft capital and a Michigan connection to Samoskevich, could be a suitor, though Shane Wright is off the table.

What acquiring Mackie Samskevich means for the Florida Panthers

Things haven’t been going well for the Panthers this season. With a 30-29-3 record, their playoff window has all but closed. With less than 20 games remaining, the franchise has been fielding calls about their pending unrestricted free agents for weeks.But a new name has surfaced in trade discussions that has nothing to do with veterans on expiring deals. Sportsnet's Elliotte Friedman reported that the Seattle Kraken are interested in acquiring winger Mackie Samoskevich from the Panthers.The 23-year-old forward hasn't generated the offensive numbers Florida hoped for in his second season, but the organization still views him as a core piece going forward. Florida intends to make Seattle pay a steep price if any deal materializes.The Panthers aren't eager to move a former first-round pick who is still developing, especially one that coach Paul Maurice has praised repeatedly for his defensive growth and ability to create chances with his speed. Samoskevich has scored just six goals and 21 points in 60 games this season.Moreover, his 4.7 percent shooting percentage tells the story of a player who can't buy a goal right now. He's actually generating more chances than his rookie year, firing 2.15 shots per game compared to 1.8 last season.The puck just isn't going in.That represents a steep drop from his first full NHL campaign, when he notched 15 goals and 31 points in 72 games for the two-time defending Stanley Cup champions. The underlying numbers suggest the scoring drought is unsustainable rather than a sign of regression.If any team can meet Florida's asking price, it's Seattle. The Kraken owns multiple first-round picks over the next two drafts, including two acquired from Tampa Bay in last year's Bjorkstrand and Gourde deal. They also have five second-round selections and a deep prospect pool to work with.There's a Michigan connection worth noting, too. Samoskevich and Kraken center Matty Beniers were college teammates at the University of Michigan. Reuniting the two could give Seattle a familiar partnership to build around.Friedman also noted that Shane Wright will not be included in any Samoskevich deal. The Kraken continue to discuss Wright separately in talks centered on acquiring an elite scorer or a younger talent needing a fresh start.Samoskevich becomes a restricted free agent after this season and is arbitration-eligible. With no chance of postseason hockey, Florida remains a potential seller of expiring contracts but is protective of controllable young assets like Samoskevich.
Article Summary: Mackie samoskevich has scored just six goals and 21 points in 60 games this season. Florida values his potential and defensive growth, demanding a significant return. Seattle, with ample draft capital and a michigan connection, could be a suitor, though shane wright is off the table.

Article Title: Milano Cortina Winter Paralympics 2026 opening ceremony: When and where to watch?
Article Text:
Milano Cortina Winter Paralympics 2026 opening ceremony: When and where to watch? (Image via Getty)

Milano Cortina Winter Paralympics 2026 opening ceremony: Italy creates record as 600+ athletes compete



The Winter Paralympics 2026 will officially begin in Italy on March 6 with a spectacular opening ceremony. The Games will run until March 15 and bring together hundreds of elite athletes with physical and visual impairments from around the world. Competitors will participate in several winter sports events across multiple venues. Organisers say this edition will be the biggest Winter Paralympics ever held, highlighting both sporting excellence and the growing strength of the Paralympic movement.The event also marks an important historical milestone. The 2026 edition celebrates 50 years since the first Winter Paralympics were staged in Örnsköldsvik in 1976.That event featured fewer than 200 athletes from 18 countries. Today, the scale of the competition has expanded significantly. More than 600 athletes from over 50 nations are competing in 79 medal events across six sports. The Games now represent one of the most important global platforms for inclusive sport.The opening ceremony of the 2026 Winter Paralympics will be held at the historic Arena di Verona, one of Italy’s most famous ancient amphitheatres.The ceremony is set to become the first Paralympic opening event ever staged at a UNESCO World Heritage Site.The program will showcase Italian culture, music and technology. Several performers will take part in the ceremony, including Stewart Copeland, Mimi Caruso, and DJ Miky Bionic.According to the International Paralympic Committee, the 2026 edition is expected to become the largest Winter Paralympics in history. A record 616 athletes from 56 countries will compete in 79 medal events across six sports. This number surpasses the participation seen at the 2018 Winter Paralympics, where 564 athletes from 49 nations took part.Athletes will compete in six disciplines: Para-Alpine skiing, Para-biathlon, Para-cross-country skiing, Para-ice hockey, Para-snowboard and wheelchair curling. Officials said the rising number of participants reflects the continued growth and global appeal of Paralympic sport.However, the ceremony will take place amid political tensions. Some nations indicated they might boycott the event after the decision to allow Russia’s national flag and anthem to return to international competition. Despite these challenges, the focus remains on the athletes.Participation records were also set in women’s sport. The International Paralympic Committee confirmed that 160 female athletes are competing this year. This figure is 24 higher than the previous record at the 2022 Winter Paralympics, marking another step forward for inclusion in global sport.
Article Summary: Milano cortina winter paralympics 2026 opening ceremony will take place on march 6. Opening ceremony will be held at arena di verona, one of italy’s most famous ancient amphitheatres. Ceremony is set to become the first paralympic opening event ever staged at a unesco world heritage site.

Article Title: Harry Brook backs head coach 'Baz' McCullum to continue after England’s World Cup exit
Article Text:
England coach Brendon McCullum, right, chats with England's captain Harry Brook (AP Photo)

Hardik Pandya, Abhishek Sharma are fan favourites - mood outside Wankhede Stadium

MUMBAI: Hailing Brendon McCullum as "the best coach I've ever had," England's white-ball captain Harry Brook urged the England and Wales Cricket Board to continue Brendon McCullum as the team's all-format head coach after his team lost a high-scoring semifinal of the 2026 T20 World Cup at the Wankhede Stadium by seven runs to hosts India, bringing a winter of unsatisfactory results to a close.McCullum's position has been the subject of speculation since England’s weak performance in the Ashes Down Under, in which they were whipped 4-1 by dominant Australia.Soon after England's thrilling defeat to India at the last four stage of the T20 World Cup, McCullum said that he would “love to carry on,” with Brook asserting that that the New Zealander remained “125%” the right man for the job.Showering rich praise on McCullum, Brook said that he had struck a perfect equation with the England head coach since he took over as England's white-ball skipper in April last year.“Our partnership has been good throughout the competition and since I’ve taken over. We get on very well and the communication has been outstanding. Long may it continue. I’ve said plenty of times he’s the best coach I’ve ever had. The way he speaks to everybody, he’s got an aura in the dressing room. Everybody looks up to him, the things he did in the game as a player were unbelievable and he’s just carried that into his coaching.The things he’s done over the four years since he took over have changed English cricket for the best. He’s the best head coach I’ve ever had,” Brook said at the post-match press conference on Thursday night, when quizzed about his thoughts on whether McCullum should stay in the England job.Brook pointed to the culture of resilience built around the side-clearly an influence of head coach McCullum and the captain too- when praising England on how they had repeatedly fought their way back into games during the T20 World Cup. "They've fought their arses off and we've been in the game until the very last ball almost every game. We've got some extremely good players in there, some extremely tough characters as well, to play some of the innings that we have done in this competition," he said.Brook complimented his side for competing hard against India, a team he felt had deep batting resources and a clear advantage as hosts. “I’m extremely proud of the way the boys stuck to their guns. They’ve done everything me and Baz have asked of them. We should be extremely proud of the way we almost chased down 250 on their home turf, with them knowing all the best plans throughout the competition. They just have batsmen coming out of everywhere. They’re extremely good players, clean ball strikers. If you miss you’re going for six or four. Unfortunately, we didn’t execute as well as we could have done tonight and that’s cost us.”Despite winning six out of eight games, England's World Cup campaign was far from perfect, with the side never quite producing the complete performance. It was purely resilience that had carried them all the way to the semifinals, as they pipped Nepal by four runs and beat Pakistan by two wickets in the Super 8 stage only due to a brilliant 51-ball century by Brook. Even in the last four clash against India at the Wankhede Stadium, England fought gallantly to finish at 246 for seven in reply to India's 253 for seven on a 'bowlers’ graveyard' at the Wankhede Stadium.Fighting the disappointment of a World Cup exit, Brook also felt a sense of pride in how his side refused to throw in the towel consistently during the T20 World Cup. "Yeah, disappointed, but extremely proud. Couldn't ask for much more as a captain to be honest. I think we've had an amazing campaign and I said the other day that we're never out of games and that's proven again tonight that we were in the game all the way until the last over," Brook said.Brook was quick to admit that he himself let a golden opportunity slip by spilling a chance offered by Sanju Samson at mid-on-the 'keeper-bat was on 15, and went on to plundered 74 more runs before he was out for a match-defining 42-ball 89. "Catchers win matches don't they?" Brook said, revealing that the blunder kept playing up in his mind as Samson kept pulverizing England's bowlers. "Unfortunately it didn't stay in my hands. It's just one of those things. He played a very good innings as well and arguably won them the game. Yeah, obviously it's in the back of your mind. I kept on looking at the scoreboard and he was piling the runs on. I was like I'm going to have to get 89 tonight. It's not ideal, but it's happened now."
Article Summary: England captain harry brook praises brendon mccullum as "the best coach i've ever had" mccullum's position has been the subject of speculation since england's poor performance in the ashes down under. Mccullum said that he would “love to carry on,” with brook asserting that that the new zealander remained “125%” the right man for the job.

Article Title: Bad Bunny turns to Shohei Ohtani dominance vs Chinese Taipei after Team Puerto Rico loses dramatic WBC insurance battle
Article Text:
Bad Bunny and Shohei Ohtani (Image Via Getty)

Shohei Ohtani’s grand slam headlines Japan’s 13-0 win while Bad Bunny continues showing strong support for Kiké Hernández and Team Puerto Rico

The opening game of the 2026 World Baseball Classic in Tokyo quickly turned into a one-man show. Japan crushed Chinese Taipei 13-0 at the Tokyo Dome, but the biggest reason fans kept cheering all night was Shohei Ohtani . The Japanese superstar hit a powerful grand slam and finished the game with five RBIs, helping Japan start its title defense in dominant fashion.Many famous faces were sitting in the crowd to watch the moment live, including global music star Bad Bunny and Hollywood actor Timothée Chalamet. Bad Bunny arrived in Tokyo as a proud supporter of Puerto Rico’s team, but inside the stadium it became impossible not to watch Ohtani. His huge swing in the second inning changed the entire mood of the game and quickly became the moment everyone was talking about.Japan’s offense exploded early in the game. The team scored ten runs in the second inning, which became one of the biggest innings in World Baseball Classic history.The rally began with aggressive hitting from the top of the lineup, but the loudest moment came when Shohei Ohtani launched a grand slam deep into the stands.The blast pushed Japan to a comfortable lead and completely changed the pace of the game. By the time the seventh inning arrived, Japan was still ahead by double digits. Because the tournament uses a mercy rule, the game officially ended early with Japan winning 13-0.Shohei Ohtani finished the night 3-for-5 with five RBIs. He was only a triple away from hitting for the cycle. Fans inside the Tokyo Dome stood and cheered as he rounded the bases after the grand slam, and the moment quickly spread across social media.Among those watching from the stands was Bad Bunny, who has been very vocal about supporting Puerto Rico in the tournament. Even though he attended the Tokyo game, his loyalty to Puerto Rico’s national team has been clear throughout the event.The singer partnered with Adidas to design special BadBo 1.0 cleats for Puerto Rico players. The shoes were created using the colors of the Puerto Rican flag. Several players proudly showed them online, including Kiké Hernández, Edwin Díaz, and José De León.Hernández shared photos of the cleats on Instagram so fans could see the gift from the global music star. The gesture helped highlight the strong connection between Puerto Rico’s baseball team and one of the island’s biggest celebrities.Bad Bunny also tried to help the roster before the tournament even started. According to reports from ESPN, the singer offered to personally cover the insurance costs needed for star players Francisco Lindor and Carlos Correa so they could participate in the World Baseball Classic.However, the official insurance provider did not approve the coverage. Reports suggested Lindor’s previous elbow procedures and Correa’s contract situation made the approval difficult. Because of that decision, both players had to stay out of the tournament.Even though the plan did not work, the move showed how strongly Bad Bunny wanted to support Puerto Rico’s team. Still, on opening night in Tokyo, the spotlight clearly belonged to Shohei Ohtani, whose grand slam turned Japan’s first game into a powerful statement.
Article Summary: Shohei ohtani hit a grand slam and finished the game with five rbis. Japan crushed chinese taipei 13-0 in the opening game of the 2026 world baseball classic. Bad bunny has been very vocal about his support for puerto rico.

Article Title: Eileen Gu: Olympic champion Eileen Gu goes viral as internet sleuths claim they discovered her alleged Raya dating profile after Winter Olympics
Article Text:
Olympic champion Eileen Gu goes viral as internet sleuths claim they discovered her alleged Raya dating profile after Winter Olympics (Image Via Getty Images)



Eileen Gu’s alleged Raya dating profile sparks online buzz after winter olympics

Eileen Gu is once again trending online, but this time it is not only because of her skiing. The 22-year-old freestyle skier, who won three medals at the Winter Olympics, has caught the attention of fans after internet users claimed they found her dating profile online. Soon after her Olympic success, a post on X started spreading quickly. The post showed what looked like Eileen Gu’s profile on Raya, a private dating app often used by celebrities and public figures.Within a short time, the post crossed more than four million views, as many fans shared their reactions and curiosity. Gu, who was born in San Francisco and competes internationally in freestyle skiing, won gold in the women’s halfpipe event and silver medals in slopestyle and big air.While her performance at the Winter Olympics made headlines worldwide, the internet is now buzzing about whether the Olympic star might also be looking for love.The viral post on X showed a photo of what appeared to be Eileen Gu’s profile on Raya. Raya is a members-only dating app that is mostly used by celebrities, influencers, and people from the entertainment and sports world.The image shared online showed a glamorous picture of Gu looking over her shoulder.The bio on the profile read: “Pro skier and model, Stanford university. 2x Olympic gold medalist & model w IMG. I like cats & philosophy & white truffle oil & running & physics.”However, it is important to note that the authenticity of the profile has not been confirmed. There has been no official statement from Eileen Gu or her representatives about whether the account is real.Gu has been a major name in international skiing since the Beijing Winter Olympics. The American-born athlete chose to compete for China, the country of her mother’s birth, which created debate at the time. Some critics questioned her decision, but Gu explained her reasons openly.In a message she shared on Instagram, Gu wrote, “When I was 15, I announced my decision to compete for China. I am forever grateful for that season, and continue to maintain a close relationship with the team.”She also explained her goal behind the decision. Gu wrote, “Skiing for Team China meant the opportunity to uplift others through the universal culture of sport, and to introduce freeskiing to hundreds of millions of people who had never heard of it.”Looking back at her journey, she added, “I can look back now, at 22, and tell 12-year-old Eileen that there are now terrain parks full of little girls, who will never doubt their place in the sport.”For now, the viral Raya profile remains only an online mystery. But one thing is clear, whether it is on the slopes or on social media, Eileen Gu continues to capture the internet’s attention.
Article Summary: Olympic champion eileen gu goes viral as internet sleuths claim they discovered her alleged raya dating profile after winter olympics. The 22-year-old freestyle skier, who won three medals at the winter olympics, caught the attention of fans after internet users claimed they found her dating profile online.

Article Title: Geno Smith Release: “God is the greatest”: Geno Smith reacts to sudden release from Las Vegas Raiders
Article Text:
Image - X

Raiders Release Geno Smith: Full Contract Details and 2026 Salary Cap Impact



The Minnesota Vikings:

The New York Jets:

The Pittsburgh Steelers:

In the NFL , the "Quarterback Carousel" never truly stops spinning, it just changes speed. Today, it hit high gear as the Las Vegas Raiders officially released veteran Geno Smith. While some fans were blindsided, Geno’s reaction on social media was anything but shocking. His reaction started a full blown debate on the platform with many supporting him and wishing more for his future.Tweeting, “God is the GREATEST. THANK U LORD,” Smith signaled that he’s ready for his next chapter, even if the one in Vegas ended with a bit of a thud.The timing isn't a coincidence. NFL contracts are often built like ticking time bombs. By releasing Geno today, the Raiders avoid an $8 million roster guarantee that would have kicked in next week.While they still have to eat roughly $18.5 million in dead money, saving that $8 million gives them much-needed breathing room to rebuild a roster that struggled significantly last season.The real reason Geno is packing his bags? The Raiders are officially on the clock. With the No. 1 overall pick in the 2026 Draft, Las Vegas is widely expected to select Indiana standout Fernando Mendoza.When you have the chance to grab a franchise-altering rookie on a cheap contract, veteran bridge quarterbacks usually become "expendable."After a 2025 season where Geno was sacked 55 times and led the league in interceptions, the Raiders' front office decided it was time to stop patching the leak and start building a new house.Geno Smith is 35, but in a league starved for competent quarterback play, he won’t be unemployed for long. He is the ultimate "resilience" story, and several teams are already being linked to him:They need a veteran presence to challenge and mentor J.J. McCarthy.A potential homecoming? The Jets are reportedly looking for multiple veterans to stabilize their locker room.Mike Tomlin loves veteran poise, and Geno could provide a high-floor insurance policy for their current room.Geno Smith has spent his career being counted out, from his early days in New York to his "they wrote me off, I didn't write back" Pro Bowl era in Seattle. While his Vegas stint was underwhelming, his upbeat reaction suggests he already knows where his next phone call is coming from.The Raiders are betting their future on a rookie, and Geno is betting on himself, again.
Article Summary: Geno smith tweeted, “god is the greatest. Thank u lord,” smith signaled that he’s ready for his next chapter, even if the one in vegas ended with a bit of a thud. By releasing geno today, the raiders avoid an $8 million roster guarantee that would have kicked in next week.

Article Title: Josh Berry Net Worth 2026: What is Josh Berry's net worth in 2026? A look at Ford's star racers' businesses and investments
Article Text:
Josh Berry (Image credits: Getty Images)

Josh Berry's net worth and earnings in racing in 2026

Josh Berry's endorsements, sponsors & life off the track

For Josh Berry, the road to the NASCAR Cup Series was not the traditional fast-track path. The Tennessee native made his name grinding in the short tracks before ascending to the top level of racing in the world of NASCAR. In 2025, he stepped into one of the most historic rides, driving the No. 21 Ford for Wood Brothers Racing, a partnership sponsored by Ford Motor Company. As he started to do better in the races and sponsors began to follow, Berry's financial profile started to grow, adding to his reputation in the garage.By 2026, Berry's estimated net worth is around $5 million, built primarily from NASCAR contracts, prize money, and sponsorships accumulated during his climb from Late Model racing to the Cup Series.A huge financial boost came when Berry had a multi-year opportunity with Wood Brothers Racing. According to industry estimates, under his Cup Series contract, his base salary is in the $1 million to $2 million range annually, excluding race bonuses and team prize distributions.Berry's first Cup Series win in 2025 boosted his market value, owing to his performance bonuses and increased the driver's appeal to sponsors, especially with many teams with historic brand power, such as the Wood Brothers organization.Before reaching the pinnacle of stock car racing, he spent years dominating short track racing and became the winning driver in CARS Tour history, a record that helped establish him as one of the most respected grassroots talents in the sport.Like many emerging stars in the sport of NASCAR, Berry's financial development is closely linked to sponsorships. Over the years, Berry has been tied to brands such as SUNNYD, Tire Pros, Bass Pro Shops, Jarrett Companies, and LubeZone, including manufacturer backing as tied to Ford. Off the track, Berry leads a decidedly down-to-earth life compared to many high-profile athletes. He lives in North Carolina with his wife Ginny, a healthcare professional, and their young daughter.For Berry, the financial success came after his rise in the sport of racing, a product of years of persistence. From running outside of racing in the early part of his career, to leading the field in one of the most historic Fords in the history of the sport, his story shows how consistent performance and the right sponsorship support can lead to a steady rise from short-track racer to long-track Cup Series success story.
Article Summary: By 2026, berry's estimated net worth is around $5 million, built primarily from nascar contracts, prize money, and sponsorships accumulated during his climb from late model racing to the cup series. Under his cup series contract, his base salary is in the $1 million to $2 million range annually.
